chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.521 of 2023 (The State v. Meezan Bank Limited and another) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 08.05.2024 Ms. Amna Ansari, Assistant Prosecutor General for the State ========= By way of the instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 94 r/w Section 561-A Cr.PC a direction has been sought by the State against Operation Manager, Meezan Bank Limited, Gulshan-e-Maymar Branch, Karachi, to produce certain documents necessary for the investigation of case outcome of FIR Crime No.59/2023 under Section 489-F PPC, PS Clifton District South Karachi. Head arguments and perused the record. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the Operation Manager, Meezan Bank Limited, Gulshan-e-Maymar Branch, Karachi, has failed to produce the documents required for the investigation of the subject case, then he could have proceeded with in terms of Section 175 P.PC. If the Investigating Officer has no intention to take action against him for such omission under the said penal section, then alternatively subject to the law he could approach the Magistrate/Sessions Judge having jurisdiction for the purpose. No case for indulgence by this Court is made out. Consequently, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Nadir*
